sectionSummary: Start with opendevbrowser_prompting_guide or opendevbrowser_skill_load opendevbrowser-best-practices "quick start" before low-level browser commands, then load the validated capability lanes when you need the current reliable transcript plus browser replay, desktop observation, research, shopping, and browser-scoped computer-use workflows.

quickStartCommands.validatedResearch: npx opendevbrowser research run --topic "Chrome extension debugging workflows" --days 30 --source-selection auto --mode json --output-format json
quickStartCommands.validatedShopping: npx opendevbrowser shopping run --query "wireless ergonomic mouse" --providers shopping/bestbuy,shopping/ebay --budget 150 --browser-mode managed --mode json --output-format json
quickStartCommands.computerUseEntry: npx opendevbrowser research run --topic "account recovery flow" --source-selection auto --challenge-automation-mode browser --mode json --output-format json
